⌘ or Ctrl + Enter: Create (save) set.

Drag the "..." on the left and drop it onto another card to change the order. You can also move up and down using the horizontal arrows.

battle.notStartedHint: Select a bot to get started. During a match, the bot's expression changes according to the flow of answers.

botPersonas.j1: He is a boss who reacts quickly. Suitable when you want to check your ability with a high BJT load.
botPersonas.j2: He is an opponent that you can warm up to and solve at a calm pace.
botPersonas.j3: It has a good balance of speed and accuracy and is suitable for daily practice.
botPersonas.j4: It responds quickly and creates just the right amount of tension for BJT preparation.

quiz.anotherRound: You can continue practicing with the template above. Habit formation and growth rate are more important than points per question.
quiz.officialModeCardDescription: Just like the actual BJT, you will practice as one common test. The J rank is not selected before taking the exam, but is estimated based on the results.
quiz.officialModeClosedTitle: Official format mocks are currently closed
quiz.officialModeClosedDescription: Administrators can open and close it at any time using the feature flag. You can still practice by target J rank even while closed.
quiz.officialModeLockedTitle: Official format simulation is a paid feature
quiz.officialModeLockedDescription: Upgrade your plan to use a simulation that closely resembles your actual BJT configuration. During the campaign, you can also earn rights and quotas through referrals.
quiz.officialModeNoTemplatesTitle: The official mock template has not been released.
quiz.officialModeNoTemplatesDescription: The functionality is enabled and the rights are valid, but there are no published official templates yet.
quiz.officialModeInviteDescription: Referral link: {link}. Referral benefits will be granted via server-side quota/entitlement when the campaign is activated.
quiz.officialModeInviteUnavailable: Referral links will be displayed when the social_growth feature flag is enabled.
quiz.practiceModeCardDescription: Choose J5-J1+ as your practice target and strengthen your weaknesses before moving on to the official format.
quiz.formatGuideSummary: Organized official BJT configuration for practice
quiz.formatGuideIntro: BJT measures the Japanese communication skills needed in business situations. It focuses on the ability to process information such as audio, text, photographs, and diagrams, and to choose appropriate responses.
quiz.formatGuideBullet1: The official exam has 80 questions and takes approximately 2 hours.
quiz.formatGuideBullet2: The result is a scaled score from 0 to 800 points, corresponding to 6 levels from J5 to J1+. This is your result rank, not the exam level you choose when taking the exam.
quiz.formatGuideBullet3: The main structure consists of three parts: listening comprehension, listening comprehension, and reading comprehension.
quiz.formatGuideBullet4: Each question is multiple-choice and official scores are processed based on IRT.
quiz.formatGuideBullet5: Scores and bands in the app are estimates of your learning progress and are not official results.
quiz.formatGuideDisclaimer: NihonGo BJT is a learning product that is not affiliated with the organizer. The above is a summary of BJT/Pearson VUE official information, so please check the official information before taking the exam.
quiz.officialSection1: Understanding the scene, understanding what is being said, and comprehensive listening comprehension. Understand the situation and intent from audio.
quiz.officialSection2: Make work-related decisions by combining audio with materials, charts, and text information.
quiz.officialSection3: Vocabulary/grammar, expressive reading comprehension, comprehensive reading comprehension. Read and judge documents and materials.
quiz.officialStrategyTitle: How to use with NihonGo BJT
quiz.officialStrategy1: J5-J4: Solidify the foundation with vocabulary, grammar, and short contexts.
quiz.officialStrategy2: J3-J2: Review situational problems such as emails, meetings, and reports with explanations.
quiz.officialStrategy3: J1/J1+: Solve with a time limit and see print reviews and estimated score trends.
quiz.hubTemplatesHeading: Choose exercises according to your goals
quiz.hubTemplatesDescription: Each template has sections and questions. After completing the test, you can check the estimated score and explanation for each question.
quiz.emptyPublicTitle: There are no published exercise templates.
quiz.emptyPublicDescription: Please try again later. If you are an administrator, please check the public settings.
quiz.estimatedScoreCaveat: Estimated scores are for tracking your practice progress and are not official test results.
quiz.keyboardHint: Select with A/B/C/D · Mark with F
quiz.coachJ1: It continues at a steady, steady pace. Let's look back at the gaps in each field (reading comprehension, vocabulary, situations) in small units.
quiz.coachJ2: The soil will gradually build up. You can improve your skills by focusing on one meaning of expressions that often appear in business and practicing the same sentence pattern repeatedly.
quiz.coachJ3: There is still room for growth. Use short conversational sentences to establish each set of ``subject → action → deadline'' and reuse the same sentences once a week.
quiz.coachJ4: Don't rush. For example, you can see improvement if you focus on one of the following topics: ``meetings, emails, and late notifications,'' and study 10 questions in the same field all at once.
quiz.coachJ5: Mistakes signal the next step. Make a note of only 2-3 expressions and create a rhythm of glancing at the previous one before writing the new one.
quiz.error: Quiz failed to load or save.
quiz.noQuestion: All current questions have been answered (or no questions have been added to the quiz yet).
quiz.subtitle: Select by BJT rank, practice according to the 3 skill structure of the official exam, and check your weaknesses with estimated scores.
quiz.title: BJT practice according to the official structure

analytics.learningPathsDescription: Pass Engine is expanding. Currently showing public catalog — individual progress will be added after enrollment is implemented.
analytics.learningPathsEmpty: There are no public passes yet.

helpPage.title: Help center
helpPage.subtitle: Need help?Find the answer here.
helpPage.faq1a: NihonGo BJT is a Japanese learning and BJT (Business Japanese Test) prep platform.
helpPage.faq2q: Can I use it for free?
helpPage.faq2a: yes. Flashcard reviews, dictionary searches, and basic BJT practice questions are free.
helpPage.faq3a: Log in, select "BJT" from the menu, and start practicing according to your level.
helpPage.faq4a: yes. Your data is stored securely and you can request to export or delete it at any time in your settings.
helpPage.contactDesc: If you can't find your answer, please contact us through our feedback page.

termsPage.title: Terms of use
termsPage.subtitle: Last updated: May 1, 2026
termsPage.section1Body: By accessing and using NihonGo BJT, you are deemed to have agreed to these Terms.
termsPage.section2Body: You are responsible for managing your account and password. Do not share your login information with third parties.
termsPage.section3Body: NihonGo BJT content may be used for learning purposes only. Please do not copy or redistribute without permission.
termsPage.section4Body: We respect your privacy. Please see our privacy policy for details.
termsPage.section5Body: These Terms may be updated from time to time. Changes will be notified on the Platform.

privacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPolicyPage.subtitle: Last updated: May 1, 2026
privacyPolicyPage.section1Body: We collect the information you provided during registration (name, email) and learning data (review progress, test results).
privacyPolicyPage.section2Body: We use your data to personalize your learning experience, improve our platform, and send you notifications (if you consent).
privacyPolicyPage.section3Body: Your data is stored securely with an encrypted connection. Sessions are strictly protected.
privacyPolicyPage.section4Body: You can request to export your data or delete your account at any time by going to Settings > Privacy.
privacyPolicyPage.section5Body: If you have any questions regarding our privacy policy, please contact us via our feedback page.

feedbackPage.title: send feedback
feedbackPage.subtitle: Your feedback will help us improve NihonGo BJT.
feedbackPage.success: Thank you for your feedback!Please check as soon as possible.
feedbackPage.error: Unable to send. Please try again later.

inbox.title: Review inbox
inbox.subtitle: A note from a senior. It's not a flashcard, it's a review that comes after you make a mistake.
inbox.feelUseful: Looks like it can be used

onboarding.title: Please select your work name
onboarding.explanation: In Career RPG, you will experience being a new employee working at a Japanese company. Please choose a Japanese name that is used in emails, conversations, and business situations.
onboarding.explanationDetail: In Japan, the order is "surname (sei) + first name (mei)". Example: Yuki Sato = Last name is Sato, first name is Yuuki. You can choose from suggestions or enter your own.
onboarding.error: Could not save. Please try again.
